site_description: The Galaxy Training website provides training materials for the Galaxy bioinformatics platform, covering topics from introductory concepts to advanced data analysis.

content_types.description: Individual modules or lessons within a learning pathway, often focusing on a specific task or tool.

navigation.description: Modules are listed within a learning pathway page, often identified by anchor links.

examples.title: Module 1: Introduction to Galaxy
examples.description: Provides a first look at the Galaxy platform.

examples.title: Module 2: Working with Data
examples.description: Learn the basics of data manipulation inside Galaxy.

content_types.typical_structure: Modules are identified with 'Module X: ' title, followed by a brief description. They are typically linked via anchor tags within a longer learning pathway page.

content_types.description: Topical collections of tutorials, slides and related materials covering a specific subject area within Galaxy.

navigation.description: Courses are organized by topic and accessible from the main training material page.

examples.title: Introduction to Galaxy Analyses
examples.description: A tutorial introducing users to basic Galaxy analyses.

examples.title: Using Galaxy and Managing your Data
examples.description: Tutorials about the Galaxy interface and data management.

examples.title: Climate
examples.description: Tutorials relating to climate data analysis in Galaxy.

content_types.typical_structure: A course page typically lists multiple tutorials and resources related to a specific topic.  Each item has a title and a brief description, with links to the resource itself.
